# 拓展欧拉定理

$$
a^b \equiv
\begin{cases}
    a^{b \equiv \phi(m)},             & \begin{aligned}[l] &\gcd(a,m)=1 \end{aligned} \\
    a^b,                              & \begin{aligned}[l] &\gcd(a,m) \ne 1, \ b < \phi(m) \end{aligned} \\
    a^{(b \mod \phi(m))+\phi(m)},     & \begin{aligned}[l] &\gcd(a,m) \ne 1, \ b \geq \phi(m) \end{aligned}
\end{cases}
$$
